name: mobile
//main: Expo Router boots from its own entry rather than an App.tsx — do not change.

scripts.//build: `expo export` bundles the JS for all platforms (no native toolchain); the hermetic JS proof is typecheck + lint + test — see README's verification boundary.

//dependencies: Expo-SDK-governed versions resolved via `npx expo install` from Expo SDK 57 (expo@57.0.7 bundledNativeModules.json) — see references/compatibility-matrix.md. Do not hand-bump off the SDK; upgrade the SDK and run `npx expo install --fix`.
